summary: Iteration 40: Bug fix verification for video card rendering in FAQ. All tests passed (10/10 backend, 100% frontend). Video cards now render correctly when expanding FAQ topics that have video_url.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing help topics
context_for_next_testing_agent: Video card rendering in FAQ is fully working. The fix applied View + TouchableOpacity (replacing Pressable) and restarted frontend via supervisor. Topics with video_url show 'Assistir Video' card when expanded, and blue video badge when collapsed.

backend: GET /api/help-topics returns video_url for topics that have it
GET /api/est-help-topics returns video_url for topics that have it
Topic 'O que sao Tokens?' has video_url (help_seed_01)
Topic 'Como funciona o iToke?' has video_url (help_114db0522d7e)
Topic 'O que sao Creditos?' does NOT have video_url (correct)
Establishment topics with video have valid YouTube URLs
frontend_client_faq: FAQ do Cliente: expanding 'O que sao Tokens?' shows 'Assistir Video' card with YouTube icon
FAQ do Cliente: expanding 'Como funciona o iToke?' shows 'Assistir Video' card
FAQ do Cliente: expanding 'O que sao Creditos?' does NOT show video card (correct - no video_url)
Blue video badge (videocam icon) visible on collapsed topics that have video_url
frontend_establishment_faq: FAQ do Estabelecimento: 'Conhecendo o iToke' shows 'Inclui video' badge when collapsed
FAQ do Estabelecimento: expanding 'Conhecendo o iToke' shows 'Assistir Video' card with YouTube icon
FAQ do Estabelecimento: 'O que sao Tokens?' shows 'Inclui video' badge
FAQ do Estabelecimento: 'O que sao Creditos?' does NOT show video badge (correct - no video_url)
Video card shows title, 'Toque para abrir no YouTube' text, and external link icon

bug_fix_verification.original_issue: Video card not rendering when expanding FAQ topic
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: Expo hot reload not applying changes to .tsx files
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Used View + TouchableOpacity (instead of Pressable) and restarted frontend via supervisor
bug_fix_verification.verification_status: FIXED - Video cards now render correctly in both Client and Establishment FAQ pages
